factorSnapshotProducers.description: Computes technical/chip/fundamental factors; returns as factors array

reasonSnapshotProducers.description: Sets reasonSnapshot = result.reason (raw string from RuleBasedStockAnalyzer)
P26A enrichment: if PARTIAL/COMPLETE and factorSnapshot>0, replaces reasonSnapshot with enrichReasonFromExistingFactors output
Pure function: reads factorSnapshot, produces multi-factor reason string

reasonSnapshotConsumers.description: Reads caseRow.reasonSnapshot directly for display; flags single-token reasons
Reads reasonSnapshotSummary for reason quality diagnosis

rootCause.summary: Corpus was frozen before P26A enrichment was added to ActiveScoringSnapshotBuilder. For new builds, enrichment runs at line 333-335. For frozen corpus, reasonSnapshot still has pre-enrichment single-token values.
rootCause.scoringPath: RuleBasedStockAnalyzer.analyzeStock -> factorSnapshot -> alphaScore (NOT changed by renderer)
rootCause.renderingPath: reasonSnapshot (from corpus) -> P5WalkthroughReviewUtils display -> UNDEROUTPUT when single-token
rootCause.minimalFixPoint: Read-time renderer: P26ACorpusReasonRenderer.renderReasonFromCorpusSnapshot - applies enrichment when reasonSnapshot is single-token AND factorSnapshot is non-empty.

whyFactorsPresentButReasonSingleToken: P3 corpus was created during P3-HARDRESET (before P26A). enrichReasonFromExistingFactors call was added in P26A-HARDRESET. Corpus rows built before P26A only have the raw result.reason string. factorSnapshot was always rich from result.factors.
